cpu: AMD A10-7870K Radeon R7, 12 Compute Cores 4C+8G
notes: Runs perfectly as long as you do not configure the quality of the textures in LOW. If the automatic configuration does that, change it to MEDIUM or HIGH. If you forget and you can't get it to run again the next time, just remove the prefix of the game in your Steam library folder (generally "$HOME/.local/share/Steam/steamapps/compatdata/237110) to let Steam reinstall and launch clean the game.
title: Mortal Kombat Komplete Edition

notes: I installed the game out of the box without any tweaks. Game runs on 60 FPS. Using OBS lowers FPS.
title: Mortal Kombat Komplete Edition

notes: It game launches normally, but when the auto graphics configuration starts it never ends. To fix this issue, it's necessary to edit the file "/home/$USER/.steam/steam/steamapps/compatdata/237110/pfx/drive_c/users/steamuser/Application Data/MKKE/options.ini" and set "configured" as "true". To get a better performance, I suggest to set the game Launch Options as "PROTON_NO_ESYNC=1 %command%".
title: Mortal Kombat Komplete Edition

notes: Worked perfectly for a single player with a PS4 controller. Didn't try multiplayer. Keyboard configuration seems to have issues, but since controller works perfectly I didn't bother investigating whether those issues are real or some mistake on my side.
title: Mortal Kombat Komplete Edition

notes: Runs perfectly out of the box
title: Mortal Kombat Komplete Edition

notes: Completed the entire single player campaign and viewed some of the extra content. Everything ran perfectly and frame rates were always maxed out at 60 FPS. No special settings were required. No glitches whatsoever.
title: Mortal Kombat Komplete Edition

notes: It works great out of the box, but with some stuttering. Using PROTON_USE_D9VK=1 seems to fix this issue.
title: Mortal Kombat Komplete Edition

notes: Ran perfectly out of the box with no tweaks or command line arguments and maintained 60 FPS at 1440p on my 144Hz FreeSync enabled monitor at max settings with 144 FPS during cutscenes. Tried PROTON_USE_D9VK=1, but the game ran the same.
title: Mortal Kombat Komplete Edition

notes: Runs great OOTB, no tweaks needed.
title: Mortal Kombat Komplete Edition
